nodes.label: Test for fused_store_index_k_cache kernel.  Design Notes:   1. torch.cuda.syn
Read a single token's fp8 values and scale from the paged buffer     using flat
Write a single token's fp8 values and scale into the paged buffer     using fla
Reference kernel of the fused kernel's quantization:       abs_max = max(|row|)
Compare fused CUDA kernel against a pure-Python implementation     of the *same
Both fused kernel and act_quant should approximately reconstruct     the origin
